data.title: Dogecoin Flips Bullish After Elon Musk Video, But Shiba Inu Skyrockets 5%
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) turned bullish after weeks as Shiba Inu (SHIB) rose by nearly 5% following Elon Musk's sharing of an AI-generated video where he depicted as "The Dogefather" petting a Shiba Inu dog. Musk presented the AI video on Thursday, humorously mimicking a scene from the "Godfather" movie while discussing Doge's wedding and private keys. Musk commonly refers to himself as the "Dogefather," a term he first used during his 2021 "Saturday Night Live" appearance and frequently since then to promote Dogecoin. He also hinted at a Department of Government Efficiency acronym that hinted at the canine-themed coin. Last month, Musk announced SpaceX's plan to potentially send the memecoin to the moon next year. data.description: In Naples, Florida, on March 20, 2026, JBM® Institutional Multifamily Advisors announced the exclusive listing of Eagle Bend, an 80-home Build-to-Rent community located in North Port, FL. data.title: Hunter Nation Praises Department of Interior for Unleashing Hunters on Frontlines of Conservation in Nation's Parks
data.description: In a recent development on March 20, 2026, in Mission, Kansas, Hunter Nation, a leading advocate for hunters in the country, marked a significant achievement with a new initiative by the Department of the Interior (DOI) and National Park Service (NPS). This pioneering program aims to involve hunters extensively in conservation efforts. The initiative will see a substantial increase in the participation of hunters in the conservation process, showcasing their critical role in this important endeavor.

data.title: Michael Saylor Makes A Bitcoin Retirement Plan Possible If You're Willing To Risk It
data.description: A Bitcoin firm, Beretirement, suggests utilizing four different assets for a retirement plan involving Bitcoin (BTC). The "portfolio garage" includes various Bitcoin-linked investments with specific roles. Direct ownership of Bitcoin offers complete control without intermediaries, though it carries high volatility, with drawdowns reaching 50%–70%, necessitating long-term commitment. BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) ETF provides exposure to Bitcoin prices in a conventional format for brokerage and retirement accounts. For more details, visit a news platform.

data.title: White House proposal aims to establish national AI policy, steering clear of state laws and creating new regulator.
data.description: The AI policy framework introduced by the Trump administration covers a wide range of national issues, including child safety and data centers. This national approach aims to address key concerns related to artificial intelligence.

data.title: Solar Stock Makes Massive Breakout As Analyst Issues Street's Sole Buy Rating
data.description: Heightened tensions in the Middle East have led to significant fluctuations in European energy prices, prompting Jefferies to predict a surge in demand for solar power. data.title: New York Car Insurance Coverage Levels Explained in HelloNation Featuring Insurance Agent Eric Jaslow
data.description: A recent report from Nyack, N.Y., released on March 20, 2026, discusses the impact of liability limits, no-fault insurance, and optional protections on the financial risk faced by drivers in New York State. It explores the question of how much car insurance New York State drivers should obtain to ensure adequate on-road protection. This analysis provides crucial insights into the insurance landscape, aiming to guide drivers in making informed decisions about their coverage needs.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Courtney Paat Examines Florida Insurance Coverage and How Families Can Avoid Overpaying
data.description: In Plant City, Florida, as of March 20, 2026, a recent article has provided valuable insights into insurance strategies for families in the state. It offers practical tips on how Florida families can effectively manage their insurance coverage by finding a balance between protection, deductibles, and liability limits while staying within their budget. The aim is to ensure that their policies adequately safeguard their interests without overextending their financial resources. This information prompts Florida families to assess the adequacy of their insurance coverage and make informed decisions to secure their assets and loved ones.

data.title: Shadow APIs and Weak Gateway Controls Elevate Fintech Risk, Finds Info-Tech Research Group
data.description: As banks increasingly collaborate with fintech firms to enhance digital services on a large scale, the use of externally facing APIs has become essential for modern banking systems. Despite this, numerous institutions face challenges with monitoring APIs in use and ensuring uniform compliance through a well-established gateway solution.

data.title: Bristol Myers Secures FDA Nod For Opdivo Plus Chemo For Untreated Hodgkin Lymphoma
data.description: The FDA has granted approval for Bristol Myers Squibb & Co.'s Opdivo (nivolumab) in combination with chemotherapy for untreated Hodgkin lymphoma, a highly treatable form of cancer with notable long-term survival rates, especially when diagnosed early. This treatment approval involves the use of nivolumab along with doxorubicin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine (AVD) for individuals aged 12 and above who have not received prior treatment. Bristol-Myers Squibb's stock, listed on the NYSE under the symbol BMY, is facing a decline. One of the reasons behind this development could be attributed to the news of the FDA approval. Hodgkin lymphoma is characterized by the presence of multinucleated Reed–Sternberg cells (RS cells) in the lymph nodes. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PLANET HOLLYWOOD HOTEL & CASINO LANDS IN TBILISI WITH GEORGIA'S FIRST INTEGRATED RESORT DESTINATION
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Planet Hollywood Resorts International unveiled its entrance into the Tbilisi, Georgia market. The renowned entertainment-focused hospitality brand made this move through a freshly inked license agreement with Orbi Group and Block. This development introduces the recognized brand to the region and signifies a strategic expansion for Planet Hollywood Resorts International.
